messages.content:
Hi,
 
I am Pawan Lohia from India visiting bkk as per details below
 
Members
1) My self 37 years old)
2) My wife (33 years old)
3) our 6 years old daughter 
 
Dates
Reaching BKK on 15 Oct 1 AM (i.e. 14th Oct late night
Leaving BKK on 21 Oct 12:05 AM
 
Broad Itinerary 
Based on our research and interests we plan to cover the following
 
1) Kidzania
2) Underwater world in Siam Paragon
3) Madam Tussads 
4) Safari world zoo and marine park
5) Dream world (incl Snow world)
6)  Siam Park
7) 1 Day trip to Coral Island
8) China Town
9) Market in Pratunam
10) MBK Mall
11) Chatachut Market
12) Kanchanaburi and tiger temple
 
Any other places that you may recommend. We are open to modifications in the above itinerary based on your suggestions/feedback.
 
 
Services required
1) Help in preparing the above itinerary 
2) Tourist guide and travel arrangement for the trip to
Â·         Kanchanaburi and tiger temple

Â·         Safari world zoo and marine park

Â·         1 Day trip to Coral Island

Â·         Dream world (incl Snow world)

3) Cost effective ticket booking
4) hotel pick up and drop facility
5) help in selecting vegetarian restaurants in bangkok since we are strictly veg food eaters.
 
 
We request you to let us know how we can avail your services and the costs involved.
 
With warm regards
Pawan Lohia
+91 9883037006
